info.title: Auphonic API
info.description:
The Auphonic REST API allows you to integrate audio post production services
and algorithms into your scripts, external workflows and third-party applications.

For the full API documentation, see the [Auphonic API docs](https://auphonic.com/help/api/).

The API comes in two flavours:
- A **Simple API** for quick shell scripts and batch processing of multiple files.
- A complete **JSON API** for full control.

Resources (presets, productions, services, etc.) are referenced using a UUID,
a unique string of 22 characters from `[a-zA-Z0-9]`.

All API responses use a standard envelope format:
```json
{
  "status_code": 200,
  "error_code": null,
  "error_message": "",
  "form_errors": {},
  "data": { ... }
}
```

## Authentication

All API endpoints require authentication (except Info endpoints, which also work without).
Three authentication methods are supported:

- **API Key (Bearer Token):** Generate a key in your
  [account settings](https://auphonic.com/accounts/api-key/) and pass it via
  `Authorization: Bearer {api_key}` header or `?bearer_token={api_key}` query parameter.
- **HTTP Basic Auth:** Use your Auphonic username and password.
  Only recommended for personal scripts, not for third-party apps.
- **OAuth 2.0:** For third-party applications. Supports the Authorization Code flow
  (web apps) and the Resource Owner Password flow (desktop/mobile apps).

See the [Authentication documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/authentication.html) for details.

tags.name: Simple API
tags.description:
Simplified **singletrack** production creation in a single multipart/form-data request.
Only singletrack productions can be created with the Simple API.

See the [Simple API documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/simple_api.html) for details.

tags.name: Singletrack vs. Multitrack
tags.description:
Auphonic supports two production modes with **different parameters**:

- **[Singletrack](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html)** (`is_multitrack: false` or omitted): Process a single audio file.
  Algorithms include filtering, noise reduction, adaptive leveler, loudness normalization, and more.
- **[Multitrack](https://auphonic.com/help/api/multitrack.html)** (`is_multitrack: true`): Mix and process multiple audio tracks (e.g. separate
  speaker microphones, music tracks). Master-level algorithms control leveling, loudness, and
  noise gate/crosstalk reduction. Per-track algorithms (filtering, noise reduction, fore/background,
  gain, panning) are set individually via `multi_input_files[].algorithms`.

**Use the dropdown selector in the request/response schemas below to switch between
Singletrack and Multitrack and see the relevant parameters for each mode.**

tags.name: Productions
tags.description:
Create, manage and process audio productions.

Productions can be **Singletrack** or **Multitrack** — each mode has different algorithm
parameters. When viewing the request/response schemas, **use the dropdown selector to switch
between Singletrack and Multitrack** to see only the relevant fields.

See the [Productions API documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html) for details.

tags.name: Presets
tags.description:
Create and manage production presets (templates).

Presets can be **Singletrack** or **Multitrack** — each mode has different algorithm
parameters. **Use the dropdown selector in the schemas to switch between modes.**

See the [Presets API documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html) for details.

tags.name: Services
tags.description:
Manage external service integrations.

See the [External Services documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/query.html#external-services) for details.

tags.name: Info
tags.description:
Query available formats, algorithms and service types.

See the [Info API documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/query.html) for details.

tags.name: User
tags.description:
User account information.

See the [User API documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/query.html#user-account-info) for details.

post.summary: Create singletrack production in a single request
post.description:
Creates a **singletrack** production, uploads a file, sets metadata and optionally starts
processing — all in a single `multipart/form-data` request.
Reference an existing [preset](https://auphonic.com/help/api/complex.html) via UUID.

Only singletrack productions can be created with the Simple API. For multitrack
productions, use the JSON API endpoints.

See the [Simple API documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/simple_api.html) for details.

preset.description: UUID of the preset to use as template. See the [Simple API documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/simple_api.html#start-a-production-and-upload-a-file) for details.

input_file.description: Audio/video file upload, HTTP URL, or filename on external service. See the [Simple API documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/simple_api.html#start-a-production-and-upload-a-file) for details.

title.description: Production title. See the [metadata documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/simple_api.html#detailed-audio-metadata) for details.

append_chapters.description: Append chapter marks as text to the summary/description field

image.description: Cover image file upload or URL

chapters.description:
[Chapter marks](https://auphonic.com/help/api/simple_api.html#adding-chapter-marks).
Can be sent as a text file upload, a plain string value, or a URL pointing to a chapters file.
Format is one chapter per line: `HH:MM:SS.mmm Title <optional_url>`

Example:
```
00:00:00.000 Intro
00:02:30.000 First Topic https://example.com
00:10:15.500 Second Topic
```

output_basename.description: Basename for output filenames. Combined with suffix and ending to form the full filename.

webhook.description: Webhook callback URL. After processing, Auphonic sends an HTTP POST with `uuid`, `status` (3=Done, 2=Error), and `status_string`. See [webhook documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/webhook.html).

normloudness.description: Enable loudness normalization. Adjusts the global, overall loudness to the specified loudness target.

maxpeak.description: Maximum true peak level in dBTP. 0=auto (uses optimal value for target loudness), or set a specific limit.

denoise.description: Enable noise and hum reduction. Classifies regions with different background noises and automatically removes noise and hum.

denoiseamount.description: Noise reduction amount in dB (0=auto, -1=off/dehum only)

cut_mode.description: What to do with detected cut segments. apply_cuts: remove cut segments from output. export_uncut_audio: keep audio unchanged, only export cut list. set_cuts_to_silence: replace cut segments with silence. See the [automatic cutting documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/web/production.html#automatic-cutting) for details.

action.description: Set to "start" to begin processing immediately, or "save" (or omit) to just save. See the [Simple API documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/simple_api.html#start-a-production-and-upload-a-file) for details.

get.description:
Returns details about all productions of the authenticated user.
Use `limit` and `offset` for pagination. Use `uuids_only=1` or
`minimal_data=1` to reduce response size.

**Note:** If not using `uuids_only` or `minimal_data`, the limit
is restricted to 10.

With `minimal_data=1`, each production only contains: `uuid`, `is_multitrack`,
`creation_time`, `metadata` (title only), `status`, and `output_files`
(format, bitrate, download_url, filename).
See the [minimal_data documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/query.html#query-minimal-data) for details.

To paginate through all results, increment `offset` by `limit` until fewer
than `limit` results are returned. There is no total count in the response.

See the [list productions documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/query.html#list-all-productions-and-presets) for details.

**Rate limit:** 60 requests per 4 minutes. Returns 429 if exceeded. For frequent status checks, use webhooks or the `/api/production/{uuid}/status.json` endpoint instead.

post.description:
Creates a new audio production. All details (metadata, output files,
algorithms, outgoing services, chapters, etc.) can be set in the
JSON request body. To start processing immediately, include
`"action": "start"`.

**⬇ Select Singletrack or Multitrack in the request body schema below to see the
relevant parameters for each mode.** Set `is_multitrack: true` for multitrack productions.

**Rate limit:** 40 requests per 2 minutes (100 for business accounts). Returns 429 if exceeded.

See the [create production documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#create-a-production-with-detailed-audio-metadata) for details.

get.description:
Returns full details about a specific production.

**Rate limit:** 60 requests per 4 minutes. Returns 429 if exceeded. For frequent status checks, use webhooks or the `/api/production/{uuid}/status.json` endpoint instead.

See the [production details documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/query.html#details-about-a-production) for details.

post.description:
Updates an existing production. All sub-dictionaries (metadata, output_files,
algorithms, etc.) can be changed. Use `reset_data: true` to clear all existing
data before applying changes. Use `reset_cover_image: true` to remove the cover image.

**⬇ Select Singletrack or Multitrack in the request body schema below to see the
relevant parameters for each mode.**

See the [create production documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#create-a-production-with-detailed-audio-metadata) for details.

delete.description: See the [update and delete documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/update.html#further-examples) for details.

post.summary: Upload audio file and/or cover image
post.description:
Upload local audio/video files and/or cover image to a production.
Must use `multipart/form-data` encoding.

**Singletrack:** Use `input_file` for the main audio file.

**Multitrack:** Use the track ID (from `multi_input_files[].id`) as the form field name for each track.
Example: `-F "speech track=@file1.wav" -F "music track=@file2.wav"`

**Intro/Outro:** Use `intro_file`/`outro_file` for single intro/outro,
or the track ID for multiple intros/outros.

See the [file upload documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/complex.html#start-a-production-and-upload-a-local-file) for details.

additionalProperties.description:
Additional track files for multitrack productions or multiple intros/outros.
Use the track ID (from multi_input_files[].id) as the field name.

post.description:
Starts the audio post production for the given production UUID.

See the [start production documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/complex.html#start-a-production-and-upload-a-local-file) for details.

Stops a currently processing production.

See the [update and delete documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/update.html#further-examples) for details.

Publishes the finished production to all configured outgoing file transfers.
Only takes effect if the production has outgoing services and `in_review` is true.

See the [outgoing file transfers documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#outgoing-file-transfers) for details.

get.description:
Returns the current status code and status string of a production.
For frequent status checks, prefer using webhooks instead.

See the [production details documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/query.html) for details.

post.description:
Add output file format configurations to a production.

See the [output files documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#output-files) for details.

delete.description: Removes all output file configurations from a production.

post.description:
Add chapter marks to a production. Each chapter requires a start time and title.

See the [chapters documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/complex.html#adding-chapters) for details.

delete.description: Removes all chapter marks from a production.

post.description:
Set audio processing algorithm parameters for a production.
See the `/api/info/algorithms.json` endpoint for all available parameters and values.

**⬇ Select Singletrack or Multitrack in the request body schema below** to see the
relevant algorithm parameters for each mode.

For multitrack productions, per-track algorithm settings (e.g. `backforeground`, `gain`, `pan`)
are set via `multi_input_files[].algorithms`, while this endpoint sets the master-level algorithms.

See the [multitrack algorithm documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/multitrack.html#multitrack-audio-algorithm-settings) for details.

Set or update audio metadata for a production.

See the [metadata documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#create-a-production-with-detailed-audio-metadata) for details.

get.description:
Returns outgoing service configurations for a production.

See the [outgoing file transfers documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#outgoing-file-transfers) for details.

post.description:
Add outgoing file transfer services to a production.
Reference services by UUID. Some services accept additional parameters
(e.g. SoundCloud: sharing, downloadable; YouTube: privacy, category).

See the [outgoing file transfers documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#outgoing-file-transfers) for details.

delete.description: Removes all outgoing service configurations from a production.

post.description:
Add or update speech recognition settings for a production.
For external services (Google, Amazon, Speechmatics), provide the service UUID.
For Auphonic Whisper, omit the UUID and just provide a language.
Set `shownotes: true` to enable automatic shownotes and chapters generation.

See the [speech recognition documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#adding-speech-recognition) for details.

delete.description: Remove speech recognition service from a production.

post.summary: Add multi-input files (intros, outros, inserts, multitrack)
post.description:
Add multiple input files to a production. Each call appends files.
Supported types: `intro`, `outro`, `insert`, `multitrack`.
Files can be referenced via external service UUID + filename, HTTP URL, or uploaded separately.

See the [multitrack documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/multitrack.html) for details.

delete.description: Removes all intro, outro, insert and multitrack files from a production.

post.summary: Update a specific multi-input file track
post.description:
Update a specific multi-input file identified by track ID.

See the [multitrack documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/multitrack.html) for details.

delete.summary: Delete a specific multi-input file track
delete.description: Remove a specific multi-input file identified by track ID.

post.description:
Add audio cut segments to a production. Cuts are specified as a list of
`[start_time, end_time]` arrays in seconds. Cut times must be relative
to the main input file.

See the [cuts documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#adding-cuts) for details.

delete.description: Removes all audio cut segments from a production.

post.description:
Set denoise segments for a production. Segments define time regions with
individual denoise/filter settings. Segments must be contiguous (no gaps
or overlaps). If a segment has no explicit settings, defaults are applied.

See the [segments documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#adding-segments) for details.

delete.description: Removes all denoise segments from a production.

get.description:
Returns the webhook URL configured for a production.

See the [webhooks documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/webhook.html) for details.

post.description:
Set a webhook URL for a production. After processing is finished,
Auphonic will send an HTTP POST to this URL with `uuid`, `status` (3=Done, 2=Error), and `status_string`.
First tries application/x-www-form-urlencoded, retries with multipart/form-data on failure.

See the [webhooks documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/webhook.html#add-a-webhook-to-a-production) for details.

Sent when production processing completes (success or error).
First attempts application/x-www-form-urlencoded, retries with
multipart/form-data if the first attempt fails.

delete.description:
Removes the webhook from a production.

See the [webhooks documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/webhook.html#delete-a-webhook) for details.

get.description:
Returns details about all presets of the authenticated user.
Use `preset_type` to filter by preset type.

To paginate through all results, increment `offset` by `limit` until fewer
than `limit` results are returned. There is no total count in the response.

See the [list presets documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/query.html#list-all-productions-and-presets) for details.

post.description:
Creates a new preset (production template). Requires `preset_name`.
Chapters and input files cannot be set on presets.

**⬇ Select Singletrack or Multitrack in the request body schema below to see the
relevant parameters for each mode.** Set `is_multitrack: true` for multitrack presets.

See the [preset creation documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#creation-of-presets) for details.

**⬇ Select Singletrack or Multitrack in the request body schema below to see the
relevant parameters for each mode.**

See the [update and delete documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/update.html) for details.

delete.description: See the [update and delete documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/update.html) for details.

post.description: See the [file upload documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/complex.html#start-a-production-and-upload-a-local-file) for details.
See the [output files documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#output-files) for details.

get.description: See the [outgoing file transfers documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#outgoing-file-transfers) for details.

post.description: See the [outgoing file transfers documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#outgoing-file-transfers) for details.

**⬇ Select Singletrack or Multitrack in the request body schema below** to see the
relevant algorithm parameters for each mode.

See the [audio algorithms documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#audio-algorithms) for details.
See the [metadata documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#create-a-production-with-detailed-audio-metadata) for details.
See the [multitrack presets documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/multitrack.html) for details.

post.summary: Update a specific preset multi-input file track
post.description: See the [multitrack documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/multitrack.html) for details.

delete.summary: Delete a specific preset multi-input file track

post.description: See the [webhooks documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/webhook.html#add-a-webhook-to-a-preset) for details.

get.description:
Returns all registered external services (Dropbox, FTP, SFTP, YouTube,
SoundCloud, etc.) of the authenticated user. Each service has a type-specific
set of fields.

See the [external services documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#query-external-services) for details.

Returns a list of all supported audio and video files on the external
service with the given UUID.

**Rate limit:** 10 requests per minute (40 for business accounts). Returns 429 if exceeded.

See the [list files documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/query.html#list-files-on-an-external-service) for details.

post.description:
Register an external webhook service. Only available via OAuth2 authentication.
Used by third-party services to register as publishing targets within Auphonic.

The webhook receives production data as a signed JWT. Verify the JWT signature
using the OAuth2 client secret.

See the [External Services documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/external_service.html) for details.

webhook_url.description: Webhook URL that receives production data

custom_data.description: Custom data to include with webhook calls

get.description:
Returns all info endpoints in a single response: output file formats,
service types, audio algorithms, and production status codes.

See the [Info API documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/query.html) for details.

production_status.description:
Map of status code to status string. Status codes:
0=File Upload, 1=Waiting, 2=Error, 3=Done, 4=Audio Processing,
5=Audio Encoding, 6=Outgoing File Transfer, 7=Audio Mono Mixdown,
8=Split Audio On Chapter Marks, 9=Incomplete, 10=Production Not Started Yet,
11=Production Outdated, 12=Incoming File Transfer, 13=Stopping the Production,
14=Speech Recognition, 15=Production Changed

get.description:
Returns info for a specific subject: `output_files`, `service_types`,
`algorithms`, or `production_status`.

See the [Info API documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/query.html) for details.

Returns information and settings of the authenticated user account.

See the [User API documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/query.html#user-account-info) for details.

Download an output file from a production. The exact URL is provided
in the `download_url` field of the production's output files.
May redirect (3XX) to a storage backend.

**Rate limit:** 30 downloads per 5 minutes per production. Returns 429 if exceeded.

See the [download documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/query.html#download-result-media-files) for details.

bearerAuth.description:
API Key or OAuth2 access token. Use header `Authorization: Bearer {token}`
or query parameter `?bearer_token={token}`.

basicAuth.description: HTTP Basic Authentication with Auphonic username and password.

uuid.name: uuid
uuid.description: UUID of the resource (22-character alphanumeric string)

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 100). When returning full production/preset data (without uuids_only or minimal_data), the maximum is capped at 10.

offset.name: offset
offset.description: Number of results to skip (for pagination, 0-indexed)

uuids_only.name: uuids_only
uuids_only.description: Set to 1 to return only UUIDs instead of full objects

minimal_data.name: minimal_data
minimal_data.description: Set to 1 to return only minimal data for each item. See [minimal_data documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/query.html#query-minimal-data) for details.

error_code.description: Error code identifier, null on success

error_message.description: Human-readable error message, empty on success

Production.description:
**⬇ Select Singletrack or Multitrack below** to see the relevant response fields for each mode.
Singletrack and multitrack productions have different algorithm parameters.

status.description:
Current processing status code:
0=File Upload, 1=Waiting, 2=Error, 3=Done, 4=Audio Processing,
5=Audio Encoding, 6=Outgoing File Transfer, 7=Audio Mono Mixdown,
8=Split Audio On Chapter Marks, 9=Incomplete, 10=Not Started Yet,
11=Production Outdated, 12=Incoming File Transfer, 13=Stopping,
14=Speech Recognition, 15=Production Changed

error_status.description: Processing status where an error occurred

error_message.description: Error message if an error occurred

warning_status.description: Processing status where a warning occurred

warning_message.description: Warning message if a warning occurred

preset.description: UUID of the preset used (if any)

review_before_publishing.description: Whether to require review before publishing

in_review.description: Whether the production is currently in review

samplerate.description: Input audio sample rate in Hz

format.description: Input audio file format (mp3, vorbis, aac, etc.)

has_video.description: Whether input file contains a video track

cut_start.description: Time in seconds to cut from the start

cut_end.description: Time in seconds to cut from the end

waveform_image.description: URL of the output waveform image

start_allowed.description: Whether it is allowed to start the production

change_allowed.description: Whether it is allowed to change the production

service.description: Service UUID for incoming file transfer

status_page.description: URL to the Auphonic status web page

edit_page.description: URL to the Auphonic edit web page

statistics.description: Audio processing statistics. Only available for finished productions (status 2, 3, or 10). Structure varies by production type. Query a finished production to see the full statistics.

cuts.description: Audio cut segments as arrays of [start, end] in seconds

Preset.description:
**⬇ Select Singletrack or Multitrack below** to see the relevant response fields for each mode.
Singletrack and multitrack presets have different algorithm parameters.

append_chapters.description: Append chapter marks as text to the summary/description field

start.description: Start time as HH:MM:SS[.mmm], relative to main input file

start_sec.description: Start time in seconds, relative to main input file

start_output.description: Start time as HH:MM:SS.mmm, relative to output files (includes intro length)

start_output_sec.description: Start time in seconds, relative to output files

format.description: Output format (mp3, aac, flac, vorbis, opus, wav, video, etc.)

mono_mixdown.description: Whether to create a mono mixdown

split_on_chapters.description: Whether to split the output on chapter marks

suffix.description: Suffix added to the output filename

checksum.description: MD5 checksum of the output file

download_url.description: URL to download the output file

outgoing_services.description: UUIDs of outgoing services assigned to this output file

OutgoingService.description:
An external service configured for outgoing file transfers.
Fields present depend on the service `type`.
Query `/api/info/service_types.json` for available service types and their parameters.
Common fields (uuid, display_name, type, incoming, outgoing) are always present.
Type-specific fields (email, host, port, path, bucket, etc.) are only present for
applicable service types.

type.description: Service type (dropbox, gdrive, soundcloud, youtube, ftp, sftp, etc.)

transfer_success.description: Whether the file transfer was successful

result_page.description: Web page generated by the external service

result_urls.description: URLs of copied output files on external servers

incoming.description: Whether service supports incoming file transfers

outgoing.description: Whether service supports outgoing file transfers

base_url.description: Base URL for file access (FTP, SFTP, WebDAV, Blubrry)

podcast.description: Podcast info (OAuth Hoster services like PodBean, Captivate)

ServiceAccount.description:
An external service account registered by the user.
Fields present depend on the service `type`.
Query `/api/info/service_types.json` for available service types and their parameters.
Common fields (uuid, display_name, type, incoming, outgoing) are always present.
Type-specific fields (email, host, port, path, bucket, etc.) are only present for
applicable service types.

SingletrackAlgorithms.description:
Audio processing algorithm parameters for singletrack productions.
See the [audio algorithms documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#more-settings-for-audio-algorithms) for details.

levelermode.description: Leveler mode (response only, read-only). Automatically set based on which parameters are provided.

levelerstrength.description: Leveler strength — sets both speech and music strength. If levelerstrength_speech and/or levelerstrength_music are provided, those take priority for their respective segment types.

compressor.description: Compressor — sets both speech and music compressor. If compressor_speech and/or compressor_music are provided, those take priority for their respective segment types.

compressor_speech.description: Compressor for speech segments. Overrides compressor for speech.

compressor_music.description: Compressor for music segments. Overrides compressor for music (same=use compressor/compressor_speech value).

levelerstrength_speech.description: Leveler strength for speech segments. Overrides levelerstrength for speech.

levelerstrength_music.description: Leveler strength for music segments. Overrides levelerstrength for music (-1=same as speech).

musicgain.description: Add gain to music segments in dB

msclassifier.description: MusicSpeech classifier — set to speech or music to override automatic classification for the entire file

maxlra.description: Broadcast mode: Max loudness range in LU (0=auto)

maxs.description: Broadcast mode: Max short-term loudness in LU relative to target loudness (0=auto)

maxm.description: Broadcast mode: Max momentary loudness in LU relative to target loudness (0=auto)

normloudness.description: Enable loudness normalization. Adjusts the global, overall loudness to the specified loudness target.

maxpeak.description: Maximum true peak level in dBTP. 0=auto (uses optimal value for target loudness), or set a specific limit.

dualmono.description: Treat mono production as dual-mono (-3LU offset)

loudnessmethod.description: Loudness measurement method: program (default), dialog (measure dialog/voice loudness), rms (RMS-based loudness normalization for Audible/ACX)

denoise.description: Enable noise and hum reduction. Classifies regions with different background noises and automatically removes noise and hum.

denoisemethod.description: Denoise method. Classic: automatic noise/hum analysis. Static/Dynamic/Speech Isolation: advanced AI-based methods with reverb and breath reduction.

denoiseamount.description: Noise reduction amount in dB. For classic: 0=auto, -1=off (dehum only), 3-100. For static/dynamic/speech_isolation: 0=full (100 dB), -1=off, 3-100.

deverbamount.description: Reverb reduction amount in dB (0=full 100 dB, -1=off, 3-100). Requires denoisemethod static, dynamic or speech_isolation.

debreathamount.description: Breath reduction amount in dB (-1=off, 3-100). Requires denoisemethod dynamic or speech_isolation.

dehum.description: Hum reduction base frequency (0=auto, 50 or 60 Hz). Used with denoisemethod classic.

dehumamount.description: Hum reduction amount in dB (0=auto, -1=off, 3-100). Used with denoisemethod classic.

cutter.description: Master cutting switch (response only, read-only). Automatically enabled when any individual cutter is set to true.

cut_mode.description: What to do with detected cut segments. apply_cuts: remove cut segments from output. export_uncut_audio: keep audio unchanged, only export cut list. set_cuts_to_silence: replace cut segments with silence. See the [automatic cutting documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/web/production.html#automatic-cutting) for details.

fadetime.description: Fade in/out time in ms (0-5000, default 100)

segments.description:
Denoise segments with per-segment settings. Allows applying different noise reduction
settings to specific parts of the audio. Segments must be contiguous (no gaps or overlaps).
Requires `denoise: true` to take effect.

MultitrackMasterAlgorithms.description:
Master-level audio processing algorithm parameters for multitrack productions.
**Note:** Loudness normalization is always enabled for multitrack productions
(there is no `normloudness` toggle — use `loudnesstarget` to set the target level).
Per-track settings (filtering, denoise, backforeground, gain, pan, etc.) are in TrackAlgorithms.
See the [multitrack algorithm documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/multitrack.html#more-settings-for-multitrack-audio-algorithms) for details.

levelermode.description: Leveler mode (response only, read-only). Automatically set based on which parameters are provided.

maxlra.description: Broadcast mode: Max loudness range in LU (0=auto)

maxs.description: Broadcast mode: Max short-term loudness in LU relative to target loudness (0=auto)

maxm.description: Broadcast mode: Max momentary loudness in LU relative to target loudness (0=auto)

maxpeak.description: Maximum true peak level in dBTP. 0=auto (uses optimal value for target loudness), or set a specific limit.

dualmono.description: Treat mono production as dual-mono (-3LU offset)

loudnessmethod.description: Loudness measurement method: program (default), dialog (measure dialog/voice loudness), rms (RMS-based loudness normalization for Audible/ACX)

cutter.description: Master cutting switch (response only, read-only). Automatically enabled when any individual cutter is set to true.

cut_mode.description: What to do with detected cut segments. apply_cuts: remove cut segments from output. export_uncut_audio: keep audio unchanged, only export cut list. set_cuts_to_silence: replace cut segments with silence. See the [automatic cutting documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/web/production.html#automatic-cutting) for details.

TrackAlgorithms.description: Per-track audio processing algorithm parameters for multitrack productions.

denoise.description: Enable noise and hum reduction. Classifies regions with different background noises and automatically removes noise and hum.

denoisemethod.description: Denoise method for per-track noise reduction

deverbamount.description: Reverb reduction amount in dB (0=full 100 dB, -1=off, 3-100). Requires denoisemethod static, dynamic or speech_isolation.

debreathamount.description: Breath reduction amount in dB (-1=off, 3-100). Requires denoisemethod dynamic or speech_isolation.

dehum.description: Hum reduction base frequency (0=auto, 50 or 60 Hz). Used with denoisemethod classic.

dehumamount.description: Hum reduction amount in dB (0=auto, -1=off, 3-100). Used with denoisemethod classic.

backgroundgain.description: Background gain in dB (default: -18). Applied when track is set to background.

ducking_fadetime.description: Ducking fade time in ms (default: 500). Applied when backforeground is ducking.

msclassifier.description: MusicSpeech classifier — set to speech or music to override automatic classification

segments.description:
Denoise segments with per-segment settings. Allows applying different noise reduction
settings to specific parts of the track. Segments must be contiguous.
Requires `denoise: true` to take effect. Segment times are relative to the track file.

type.description: File type: intro, outro, insert, or multitrack

input_file.description: Filename or URL of the input file

uuid.description: UUID of the speech recognition service

type.description: Speech recognition type (google, witai, amazon, speechmatics, whisper)

language.description: Language code (e.g. en, de). Whisper uses ISO 639-1 two-letter codes; external services may use locale codes (e.g. en-US). Default: auto.

shownotes.description: Whether automatic shownotes generation is enabled

shownotes_summary_example.description: Example summary to guide shownotes generation

speaker_diarization_num_speakers.description: Number of speakers for diarization (Whisper only)

ShowNotes.description: Auto-generated show notes from speech recognition

UsedCredits.description: Credits consumed by this production (in hours)

user_id.description: Unique user identifier (stable even when username changes)

recharge_date.description: Date when recurring credits are recharged

type.description: Format type: lossy, lossless, video, or description

parameters.description: Available parameters for this service type

belongs_to.description: Parent algorithm this parameter belongs to

ProductionCreateRequest.description:
**⬇ Select Singletrack or Multitrack below** to see the relevant request fields for each mode.
Set `is_multitrack: true` for multitrack productions, or omit/set to `false` for singletrack.

ProductionCreateRequestBase.description: Common fields for creating or updating a production

preset.description: UUID of preset to use as template. See the [preset documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/complex.html) for details.

input_file.description: URL of input file (HTTP, or filename on external service)

service.description: UUID of external service for input file. See the [external services documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/complex.html#upload-files-with-external-services-sftp-ftp-dropbox-etc) for details.

metadata.description: Audio metadata. See the [metadata documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#create-a-production-with-detailed-audio-metadata) for details.

output_files.description: Output file formats. See the [output files documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#output-files) for details.

outgoing_services.description: Outgoing file transfers. See the [outgoing services documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#outgoing-file-transfers) for details.

review_before_publishing.description: Require review before publishing results to outgoing services. If true and outgoing_services are set, the production will enter review state after processing.

chapters.description:
Chapter marks for the production. Each chapter requires a start time and title.
Chapter times must be relative to the main input file — intro length is added automatically.
Alternatively, pass a URL string pointing to a chapters text file.
See the [chapters documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/complex.html#adding-chapters) for details.

output_basename.description: Basename for output filenames. Combined with suffix and ending to form the full filename.

speech_recognition.description: Speech recognition configuration. Output formats (subtitle, speech, transcript) should be defined in output_files instead. See the [speech recognition documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#adding-speech-recognition) for details.

webhook.description: Webhook callback URL. After processing, Auphonic sends an HTTP POST with `uuid`, `status` (3=Done, 2=Error), and `status_string`. First tries application/x-www-form-urlencoded, retries with multipart/form-data on failure. See [webhook documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/webhook.html).

cuts.description: Audio cuts as [[start, end], ...] in seconds. Cut times must be relative to the main input file. See the [cuts documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#adding-cuts) for details.

cut_start.description: Cut from start of audio in seconds. Removes audio before this point.

cut_end.description: Cut from end of audio in seconds. Removes audio after this point.

action.description: Set to "start" to begin processing immediately, or "save" (or omit) to just save. See the [upload documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/complex.html#upload-files-with-http) for details.

reset_data.description: Reset all production data before applying changes. Clears metadata, chapters, output files, services, intros/outros — but NOT the input file. See the [update documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/update.html) for details.

reset_cover_image.description: Remove the cover image. See the [cover image documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/update.html#delete-a-cover-image) for details.

preset_cover_image.description: UUID of preset to copy cover image from. See the [preset cover image documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/update.html#use-a-cover-image-from-a-preset) for details.

allOf.description: Request body for creating or updating a singletrack production

is_multitrack.description: Must be false or omitted for singletrack productions. **Use this selector to switch between Singletrack and Multitrack and see the different parameters for each mode.**

multi_input_files.description:
Optional [intro, outro, or insert files](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#adding-intro-and-outro) for singletrack productions.
Per-track algorithms are not available for singletrack — algorithm settings are only applied at the production level.

allOf.description: Request body for creating or updating a multitrack production

is_multitrack.description: Must be true for multitrack productions. **Use this selector to switch between Singletrack and Multitrack and see the different parameters for each mode.**

multi_input_files.description:
Audio tracks and optional intro/outro files. **Set `type: multitrack` for each audio track** to include it
in the multitrack mix. Per-track algorithm settings (filtering, denoise, gain, pan, etc.) are set via
the `algorithms` object on each track.
See the [intro/outro documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#adding-intro-and-outro) for adding intros/outros.

PresetCreateRequest.description:
**⬇ Select Singletrack or Multitrack below** to see the relevant request fields for each mode.
Set `is_multitrack: true` for multitrack presets, or omit/set to `false` for singletrack.

PresetCreateRequestBase.description: Common fields for creating or updating a preset

preset_name.description: Name of the preset (required for creation)

metadata.description: Audio metadata. See the [metadata documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#create-a-production-with-detailed-audio-metadata) for details.

output_files.description: Output file formats. See the [output files documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#output-files) for details.

outgoing_services.description: Outgoing file transfers. See the [outgoing services documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#outgoing-file-transfers) for details.

review_before_publishing.description: Require review before publishing results to outgoing services

speech_recognition.description: Speech recognition configuration. Output formats (subtitle, speech, transcript) should be defined in output_files instead. See the [speech recognition documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#adding-speech-recognition) for details.

webhook.description: Webhook callback URL. After processing, Auphonic sends an HTTP POST with `uuid`, `status` (3=Done, 2=Error), and `status_string`. First tries application/x-www-form-urlencoded, retries with multipart/form-data on failure. See [webhook documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/webhook.html).

allOf.description: Request body for creating or updating a singletrack preset

is_multitrack.description: Must be false or omitted for singletrack presets. **Use this selector to switch between Singletrack and Multitrack and see the different parameters for each mode.**

multi_input_files.description:
Optional [intro/outro files](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#adding-intro-and-outro). Intros/outros in presets require external services.
Per-track algorithms are not available for singletrack — algorithm settings are only applied at the production level.

allOf.description: Request body for creating or updating a multitrack preset

is_multitrack.description: Must be true for multitrack presets. **Use this selector to switch between Singletrack and Multitrack and see the different parameters for each mode.**

multi_input_files.description:
Audio tracks and optional intro/outro files. **Set `type: multitrack` for each audio track** to include it
in the multitrack mix. Per-track algorithm settings (filtering, denoise, gain, pan, etc.) are set via
the `algorithms` object on each track.
See the [intro/outro documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#adding-intro-and-outro) for adding intros/outros.
Intros/outros in presets require external services.

MetadataRequest.description: Audio metadata fields (all optional, supports variable substitution)

format.description:
Output format. Audio: mp3, mp3-vbr, aac (M4A/MP4), vorbis (OGG), opus, flac, alac, wav, wav-24bit.
Video: video (same format as input), audiogram (waveform video).
Other: input (original file), descr (production description), stats (processing statistics),
chaps (chapter marks txt), psc (Podlove Simple Chapters), pod2chaps (Podcasting 2.0 Chapters JSON),
cut-list (filler/silence cut list), image (cover image), tracks (individual multitrack tracks as zip).
Speech recognition: speech (data as json/xml), subtitle (srt/webvtt), transcript (html/txt).

bitrate.description: Bitrate in kbps (for lossy formats). If not set, the default bitrate for the format is used. Query available bitrates via /api/info/output_files.json.

mono_mixdown.description: Create a mono mixdown of the output

split_on_chapters.description: Split the output file on chapter marks

ending.description: File extension override (e.g. 'm4a' for AAC, 'wav.zip' or 'flac.zip' for tracks format, 'ReaperRegions.csv' or 'DaVinciResolve.edl' for cut-list)

filename.description: Full output filename override (must have correct extension). Takes priority over suffix/ending/output_basename.

outgoing_services.description: UUIDs of outgoing services to send this file to. If not set, all output files are sent to all services.

image.description: Chapter image as URL or base64-encoded data

AlgorithmsRequest.description: **⬇ Select Singletrack or Multitrack below** to see the algorithm parameters for each mode.

type.description: Captivate: episode type (normal, trailer, bonus). PodBean: episode type (public, premium, private)

SingletrackMultiInputFileRequest.description:
An intro, outro, or insert file for singletrack productions.
See the [intro/outro documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#adding-intro-and-outro) for details.

type.description:
Type of input file. See the [intro/outro documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#adding-intro-and-outro) for details.
intro: played before main audio. outro: played after main audio. insert: inserted at offset position.

id.description: Identifier for the file. Used as form field name for direct file upload.

input_file.description: Filename on external service or HTTP URL

service.description: UUID of external service for the input file

offset.description: Offset in seconds. For intro: overlap with next audio. For outro: overlap with previous audio. For insert: position in main audio file.

MultiInputFileRequest.description:
A multitrack track, intro, outro, or insert file.
**Use `type: multitrack` for each individual audio track** in a multitrack production.
See the [intro/outro documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#adding-intro-and-outro) for details on intros/outros.

type.description:
**Use `multitrack` to add an audio track** to the multitrack mix (e.g. a speaker microphone or music track).
intro/outro: played before/after main audio (see [intro/outro documentation](https://auphonic.com/help/api/details.html#adding-intro-and-outro)).
insert: inserted at offset position.

id.description: Identifier for the track. Used as form field name for direct file upload, and as a readable label for multitrack tracks.

input_file.description: Filename on external service or HTTP URL

service.description: UUID of external service for the input file

offset.description: Offset in seconds. For multitrack: when the track starts (0 = aligned with first track). For intro: overlap with next audio. For outro: overlap with previous audio. For insert: position in main audio file.

SpeechRecognitionRequest.description:
Speech recognition configuration. For external services (Google, Amazon, Speechmatics), provide `uuid`.
For Auphonic Whisper (restricted to paying users), omit `uuid` and provide `language`.

**Note:** Speech recognition output formats (subtitle, speech, transcript) are defined via
`output_files`, not here. Add an output file with the appropriate format (e.g. `subtitle`, `speech`, `transcript`)
to get the desired output.

uuid.description: UUID of external speech recognition service (omit for Auphonic Whisper)

language.description:
Language code for speech recognition. Required. Use `auto` for automatic language detection.

**Whisper (built-in):** Uses ISO 639-1 two-letter codes.
Available: auto, af, am, ar, as, az, ba, be, bg, bn, bo, br, bs, ca, cs, cy, da, de, el, en, es, et, eu, fa, fi, fo, fr, gl, gu, ha, haw, he, hi, hr, ht, hu, hy, id, is, it, ja, jw, ka, kk, km, kn, ko, la, lb, ln, lo, lt, lv, mg, mi, mk, ml, mn, mr, ms, mt, my, ne, nl, nn, no, oc, pa, pl, ps, pt, ro, ru, sa, sd, si, sk, sl, sn, so, sq, sr, su, sv, sw, ta, te, tg, th, tk, tl, tr, tt, uk, ur, uz, vi, yi, yo.

**External services** (Google, Amazon, Speechmatics): May use locale codes (e.g. en-US, de-DE).

keywords.description: Keywords and phrases to improve recognition accuracy

shownotes.description: Enable automatic shownotes and chapter generation (restricted to paying users)

shownotes_summary_example.description: Example summary to guide shownotes generation style

speaker_diarization_num_speakers.description: Number of speakers for speaker diarization (Whisper only)

speaker_diarization_names.description: Speaker names for speaker diarization (Whisper only)

Segment.description:
A segment defines unique noise reduction settings for a specific time range of the audio.
Segments must be contiguous: no gaps or overlaps, and each segment's start must equal the previous segment's stop.

start.description: Segment start time in seconds (must be >= 0)

stop.description: Segment end time in seconds (must be > start)

denoisemethod.description: Noise reduction method for this segment. speech: removes everything except speech. music: preserves speech/music/effects, removes noise. classic: classic noise reduction. off: disable noise reduction.

denoiseamount.description: Noise reduction amount in dB for this segment (0=full/auto, -1=off). Available for speech, music, classic.

deverbamount.description: Reverb reduction amount in dB for this segment (0=full/auto, -1=off). Available for speech and music methods.

debreathamount.description: Breath reduction amount in dB for this segment (-1=off). Available for speech method only.

filtermethod.description: Filter method for this segment. Set to 'off' to disable filtering for this segment.

cuts.description: List of cuts as [start_time, end_time] arrays in seconds
